notes: Дебиторка superpowers: sortable list (name/amount/date), per-client XLSX export (3 sheets, RU labels), Gemini-drafted AI reminders + hardcoded fallback, Client.lastReminderAt schema field, mark-reminded route + audit, action ribbon for remindable clients, smart-pick priority booking for inline payment, removed visual duplication of aging matrix.
Standard PAR (Opus product+technical): Technical APPROVE (3 LOW). Product ACCEPTED (3 MED recommendations: smart-pick, ENG enums in XLSX, visual duplication). All addressed in polish commit 0a391e40.

User 4-agent QA: A SHIP_READY (1 HIGH loadDebts no .catch + 1 MED pickPriorityBooking mutates input), B 92% fidelity (5 minor: mobile sort, action row, Telegram clutter, JIT-fragile className), C PASS (1 HIGH RecordPaymentModal hides selected booking + 3 MED including Gemini raw amount + 4 LOW).

Agent D applied 9 fixes: loadDebts catch+toast, RecordPaymentModal bookingContext, mobile sort selector, pickPriorityBooking copy-not-mutate, Gemini Intl.NumberFormat, DAYS_TONE_CLASS static map, mobile action row layout, Telegram button removed, AbortController on tone switch.
Final gates: tsc clean api+web; 872 API tests + 253 web tests all green.
Schema migration: Client.lastReminderAt DateTime? — additive nullable, safe under prisma db push --accept-data-loss.
